tracks.meaning: the act of conveying or communicating thoughts, feelings, or information
the look on a person's face that reflects their emotions or feelings
a mathematical statement or formula written in symbolic form
a performance or rendering of a musical piece or work
a sequence of characters or symbols that represents data or code
the acting out of emotions or characters in a theatrical performance
the distinctive style or manner in which something is created or presented
the manifestation of genes or traits in an organism's observable characteristics
a legal term or phrase used in official documentation or court proceedings
a phrase or phrase combination used to describe or market a product or idea
a vivid or noteworthy demonstration or instance of something
the process of squeezing or pressing something to extract liquid or essence
